body: Cross-card scope: spec touches both 0005-drive and 0006-rally because the layout migration is one substrate-wide change — splitting it would create a window where drive sidecars are flat and rally sidecars are folder, which complicates resumption and tooling. ac-06 (existing-folder policy) and ac-09 (post-ship integration test) are deferred to implementation time when the actual on-disk state can be inspected.
